name: Alta - Elven Queen Wants Your Village!
description:
👑 Elven Enchantress Seeks Village to Conquer! 🍷🧀

This rude bitch thinks she can just walk in and take your village! All she has is leadership of a major kingdom, an army, enchanted weaponry and… yeah, maybe she can just do that. What will you do?

This silver-haired seductress isn't just after your land - if you play your cards right, she’ll even want your mind, body, and soul! Will you resist her charms or succumb to her irresistible offer? 💋

⚠️ Warning: Negotiations may include bribery, blackmail, and bedroom diplomacy! Not for the faint of heart or weak of will! ⚠️

Join Queen Alta in a tale of politics, passion, and power. Your choices will shape the fate of nations... and possibly the contents of her royal bedchamber! 🛏️👑

Are you ready to play? The queen is waiting... 😘
creator: RosyCheeks
